overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 featuring Geralt exploring a snowy medieval fortress at dusk. The character ascends stone pathways and walks along cliffside fortifications illuminated by warm torchlight against a cold overcast sky, transitioning from narrow corridors to an open camp area.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy fortress ascent between wooden barricades and stone walls

events.description: passes a lit brazier casting warm orange light on the snow
path opens to reveal distant sea view and fortifications on the horizon

agents.ego_description: walking up the snowy stone path between wooden barricades and high stone walls

entered.detail: crude wooden crate barriers lining the left side of the path
tall weathered stone wall with rough texture
simple wooden post railing along the cliff edge
metal fire basket burning with warm flames

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a snowy path between wooden barricades and a massive stone fortress wall. Passing a burning brazier, the view opens to reveal a distant sea horizon under an overcast winter sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside walkway with wooden railings overlooking the sea

events.description: emerges onto open cliffside path with panoramic view of the sea
character turns left along the cliff edge, passing the stone tower

agents.ego_description: walking along the cliffside path, passing a round stone tower and overlooking the dark sea

entered.detail: cylindrical stone tower with narrow windows
dark ocean water meeting the cloudy sky
wooden structures visible on the distant shore

segments.scene_description: Walking along an exposed cliffside path with wooden railings, the character passes a round stone tower while overlooking the dark sea. Distant buildings are visible across the water as the path curves along the fortress edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow stone corridor between high fortress walls

events.description: enters narrow stone passage between high walls, sky becomes mostly obscured
passes wooden stairs built into the stone wall on the right

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow stone corridor, passing wooden scaffolding and stairs built into the wall

entered.detail: tight stone walls forming a narrow passageway
wooden staircase built against the stone wall
simple wooden picket fence along the path edge

segments.scene_description: The character enters a darker, narrow stone corridor between high fortress walls. Wooden stairs and scaffolding are built into the right wall as the path continues through the sheltered passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: fortress wall walkway with crenellated battlements

events.description: exits narrow corridor onto open wall walkway with battlements visible
passes another lit brazier casting warm light on the snow-covered path

agents.ego_description: walking along the fortress wall, passing crenellated battlements and snow drifts

entered.detail: stone battlements with notched parapets along the wall top
wooden defensive barriers near the camp entrance

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow corridor, the character walks along an open fortress wall with crenellated battlements on the right. The path is lined with snow drifts and lit by braziers as it curves toward a camp area.

scene_state.functional_zone: open camp courtyard with tents and wooden structures

events.description: descends into open camp area with canvas tents and wooden huts
approaches wooden ramp and central camp area with scattered NPCs

agents.ego_description: walking down into the camp area, approaching tents and wooden structures where figures are visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: standing near the tent in the camp area

entered.detail: large canvas military tent with peaked roof
small wooden shack with sloped roof
tall wooden watchtower with platform on top
wooden ramp leading up to a platform

segments.scene_description: The character descends into a wide-open camp courtyard containing canvas tents, wooden huts, and a tall watchtower. A few NPCs stand near the structures as the path leads through the muddy snow toward the camp center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the exposed, snowy heights of a cliffside fortress into the sheltered depths of a military camp. It begins as the character ascends a snowy path between wooden barricades and a massive stone wall, passing a burning brazier as the view opens toward a distant sea horizon under an overcast sky. The camera then follows the character along an exposed cliffside path past a round stone tower before shifting into a darker, narrow stone corridor flanked by high walls and wooden scaffolding. As the character exits this sheltered passage, the scene opens back up onto a crenellated battlement lined with snow drifts and braziers. Finally, the path curves downward, descending from the fortifications into a wide-open camp courtyard filled with canvas tents, wooden huts, and a tall watchtower.
